name: Country Spice Cake (Torta Speziata)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Warm espresso or Instant espresso powder dissolved in
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, soak raisins in warm water to cover for 15 to 20 minutes. Drain.
2. In another bowl, cream butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg and beat thoroughly.
4. Sift together 1 3/4 cups flour, cocoa, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt.
5. Beat in the flour mixture, alternating with espresso added in 3 additions, beginning and ending with flour.
6. Toss raisins with 1 tablespoon flour.
7. Fold in batter.
8. Butter and flour an 8-inch cake pan.
9. Pour batter into pan and smooth top.
10. Bake at 350°F until the cake shrinks slightly away from the side of the pan, about 40 minutes. The cake should still be slightly moist inside.
11. Cool on a rack.
12. Invert the cake onto a serving plate.
13. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
14. Serve with whipped cream.
